title: Change Main Workspace
excerpt:
How about implementing a function to change the default  “Main Workspace” in others user-definable? 
People what do you think ? 
thanks

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TSA!

Thanks for your suggestion! if I understand correctly, is your suggestion to have an API call with the ability to change the Workspace name?

posts.author: TSA (Andrea Fantini)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @alessandra

I don’t know is the best way but I think it is useful from the management panel of the areas to allow the user which are is main workspace.

Don’t you find it a useful function for the user?
